description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a combination of flat and gable roofs, featuring a prominent overhanging roof section and a mix of materials on the facade. The front includes a gated carport, a covered porch with a glass awning, and a small landscaped area with a tree. The exterior walls are primarily light gray, with some sections clad in stone or tile for visual interest. Windows are asymmetrically placed, with a mix of small and medium-sized rectangular panes, and there is a visible satellite dish and water tank on the flat roof section. The house is enclosed by a metal fence and gate, providing security and separation from the street. The overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a mix of flat and gable roofs, a gated carport, glass awning, and asymmetrical windows, featuring a landscaped front area and contemporary facade.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gable roof, glass awning, tree, and partial view of the carport and satellite dish.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat roof section, water tank, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: End view focusing on the gable roof and plain wall, with little architectural detail visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entry, gated carport, glass awning, landscaped area, and the full facade with window and door arrangements.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a solid door, covered porch with glass awning, steps, and a metal gate integrated with the carport.
